text:
There was a small island bathed in sunshine. Atop its peak stood a lighthouse. Every night, the keeper climbed the tower. One day, hearing mysterious footsteps, he peered out to see a girl singing. She had an eerie glow. That night, a storm hit. The keeper saved her from a hidden cave.

They became friends. She sang about lost love. He'd tell her stories. Until one dark night, she vanished. Days turned into weeks. A phantom song filled the lighthouse. Then she appeared, radiant.

They vowed never to tell each other secrets again. The nights became silent symphonies. They danced beneath the moonlight. She vanished into thin air.

Years later, the keeper thought of her often. His shadow danced on the wall. He vowed to find her. Years later... he found her. He had lived her life.

They kissed beneath the stars. She whispered goodbye. He never saw her again.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
